entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Add real tokenizer (BPE or sentencepiece) and proper embedding formatting.
Implement real audio capture/STT (Android MediaRecorder + SpeechRecognizer; iOS AVAudioEngine + SFSpeechRecognizer).
Harden streamInference protocol (binary framing, error codes).
Full GGUF parsing and conversion to TFLite/CoreML offline pipeline.
UI binding for inference latency / token rate metrics.'
